name: Combat
description: Combat skills are used during combat to make use of weapons or to understand the combat situation.

skills.name: Artillery
skills.description: This skill describes how well a characters operates a piece or artillery like a fixed cannon, a mobile artillery gun or a tank gun. This includes the ability to load ammunition, point to a target, and fire the gun. Selecting a target and computing the coordinates is not covered by this skill but by the appropriate Science skill.
